title: MPI job failure due to network timeout on node11
summary: 4-node MPI job 915000 failed after 6 hours with exit 137. Network telemetry shows node11 net_rx_mbps dropped to 0 at ~19:05 UTC. MPI timeout (300s) triggered SIGKILL across all ranks. node11 auto-drained after NodeFail detection.

timeline.event: MPI timeout — SIGKILL sent to all ranks

notes: Check switch port on node11 for link-down events. Possible NIC failure.
